_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids.

_contextSnippet: We observed no differences in cytokine levels in the media from all three cultures
details: Detected no differences in cytokine levels in media from pNF1 monocultures, fibroblast monocultures, and cocultures
